# Dandadan Manga — readdandadanmanga.online

## About
Dandadan Manga is a fan reading platform dedicated to the manga series "Dandadan" (ダンダダン) by Tatsu Yukinobu. The site provides free access to high-quality English scans of all available chapters.

## Manga Info
- Title: Dandadan
- Author: Tatsu Yukinobu
- Publisher: Shōnen Jump+ (Shueisha)
- Serialization Start: April 6, 2021
- Status: Ongoing
- Chapters Available: 234+
- Genre: Action, Comedy, Supernatural, Sci-Fi, Romance
- Synopsis: Momo Ayase, who believes in ghosts, and Ken Takakura (Okarun), who believes in aliens, are classmates who get caught up in a series of supernatural and extraterrestrial incidents after being cursed and abducted.

## Key Characters
- Momo Ayase — psychic high school student, main protagonist
- Ken Takakura (Okarun) — alien geek cursed with power by Turbo Granny
- Seiko Ayase — Momo's grandmother, powerful spirit medium
- Turbo Granny — a legendary ghost who curses Okarun

## Site Pages
- Homepage: https://readdandadanmanga.online/
- All Chapters: https://readdandadanmanga.online/manga
- Chapter Reader: https://readdandadanmanga.online/chapter/{number}
- Characters: https://readdandadanmanga.online/characters
- About: https://readdandadanmanga.online/about

## Contact
Email: Support@readdandadanmanga.online

## Disclaimer
This is a fan project. Not affiliated with Tatsu Yukinobu, Shōnen Jump+, or Shueisha. All manga content belongs to their respective copyright owners.
